component.name: TuHiN iPTV
component.summary: IPTV player for M3U, Xtream Codes, and Stalker portals

description.p: TuHiN iPTV is a cross-platform IPTV player for user-supplied playlists and portal connections.
It supports M3U and M3U8 playlists, Xtream Codes API, and Stalker portals with EPG, catch-up, favorites, and external player integration.
The app does not include channels, playlists, or media catalogs. Any IPTV sources, logos, metadata, and programme information come from services the user configures.
